title: Trigger fresh redeploy to resolve HTTP 400 preview URL

requirements.text: Trigger a fresh deployment (build + deploy) of the current UniPlace Manager application and, once deployment completes, provide a new public preview URL for the full working system.
acceptanceCriteria: A new deployment is triggered for the current UniPlace Manager project.
After deployment completes, a new public preview URL is produced and shared.
Opening the new preview URL in a browser returns the application (no HTTP 400).

constraints: Use English for any user-facing text.

Do not modify any frontend immutable paths (frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui).
Backend must remain single-actor; keep Motoko logic in backend/main.mo (no new backend services).
nonGoals: Do not add or change application features, logic, or UI during this request beyond what is necessary to complete the redeploy.
Do not introduce new authentication providers or external infrastructure.
